'''√ch-v-zh''' ('''kachavazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:querken|querken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:querken|querken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ch-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachavazh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thichavazh || jichavazh || shichavazh || kichavazh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuchavazh || jujuchavazh || shushuchavazh || kukuchavazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuchavazh || juchavazh || shuchavazh || kuchavazh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuchavazh || juchavazh || shuchavazh || kuchavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thechavazh || jechavazh || shechavazh || kechavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothochavazh || jojochavazh || shoshochavazh || kokochavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thochavazh || jochavazh || shochavazh || kochavazh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thochavazh || jochavazh || shochavazh || kochavazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh || chavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæchavazh || jæchavazh || shæchavazh || kæchavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathachavazh || jajachavazh || shashachavazh || kakachavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thachavazh || jachavazh || shachavazh || kachavazh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thachavazh || jachavazh || shachavazh || kachavazh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shachavazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshachavazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishachavazh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shachavazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshachavazhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishachavazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shachavazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshachavazhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishachavazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shachavazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshachavazhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishachavazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shachavazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshachavazhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishachavazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shachavazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshachavazhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishachavazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shachavazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshachavazhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishachavazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shachavazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshachavazhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishachavazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shachavazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshachavazhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishachavazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shachavazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshachavazhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishachavazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shachavazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachavazhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachavazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shachavazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshachavazhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachavazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shachavazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshachavazhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishachavazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shachavazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachavazhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachavazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shachavazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshachavazhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachavazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shachavazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshachavazhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishachavazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shachavazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshachavazhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishachavazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shachavazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshachavazhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachavazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shachavazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshachavazhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishachavazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shachavazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshachavazhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishachavazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shachavazhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachavazhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachavazhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
